headline: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE:DGX) Offers a Secure and Sustainable Dividend with Strong Profitability
summary: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) passes the "Best Dividend" screen with a sustainable 1.59% yield, low 35% payout ratio, and strong profitability. A solid choice for reliable dividend income and growth.
